text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back after an outing with Mejiro
Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Today was another really fun day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess having a look around somewhere you're
not familiar with can be really stimulating.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That was a nice change of pace! The new
surroundings were stimulating for my muscles too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I used to feel a little awkward about doing
stuff like that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But now, I'm always ready to go out and have
some fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Can we stop by the bookstore on
our way back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Here we are! I promise I'll be quick!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A magazine with recommendations for different
hot spots. It should come in handy for future
outings!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Which should I get... Maybe one with restaurant
suggestions?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Ryan. You're out shopping too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Dober! Just looking for a magazine...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to figure out where to go next with my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If we're gonna head out somewhere, it might as
well be to a cool place, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm... Yes, I suppose you're right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But now that I'm looking, there are just so many
options... I don't know what to pick.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's so funny?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You seem to be enjoying yourself quite a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What?! You think so? I don't feel any different
than usual...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's rare to see you this excited about something
that doesn't involve working out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you talking about? I'm not excited
or anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: H-hey, sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?! No way, not me! I'm the same as always!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I found a good magazine, so let's figure
out where we should go next!
choice_data_list:
Before we do that, we need to decide when to
go.

Before we do that, we need to decide when to
go.
I'm sure we'll have just as much fun next time.
I'm sure we'll have just as much fun next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I found a good magazine, so let's figure
out where we should go next!
choice_data_list:
Before we do that, we need to decide when to
go.

Before we do that, we need to decide when to
go.
I'm sure we'll have just as much fun next time.
I'm sure we'll have just as much fun next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: When?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ohh, right! We haven't even thought about that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I've been getting a little too ahead of
myself. How embarrassing...
choice_data_list:
That just means you're looking forward to
having a nice break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Aw... When you put it like that, it's even more
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our relaxed outing turns out better than
expected, leaving us both fulfilled.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You know it! It's gonna be so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I got it! Next time, let's go somewhere we can get
in some exercise too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we could go bouldering or something. The
more swole we can get, the more fun we'll have!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, I'm not getting overexcited or anything!
I'm the same as usual!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems to be enjoying our outing very much.
